🛡️ Hook Registry Closure Gate

A hook could be registered, tested, built, and released without anything asserting it ever fires. Now CI does.
248
hooks registered
197
reachable (computed closure)
51
dead — grandfathered ratchet
3
shipped instances of this bug class
(#959 · #2886 · 10 dead telemetry writers)

1 The closure it computes

hooks.json ──────────┐ 148 dispatch cmds → 107 unique ids agent frontmatter ───┤ seeds 46 refs → 14 ids (src/agents/*.md) skill frontmatter ───┘ 22 refs → 20 ids (SKILL.md) │ ▼ dispatcher fan-out ⟳ transitive: a reachable *dispatcher* file's │ relative imports ARE dispatch edges ▼ ┌───────────────────────────┐ │ closure = 197 reachable │ entries maps = 248 registered └───────────────────────────┘ │ ▼ dead = registered − closure = 51 → ratchet baseline (only shrinks)

2 Five failure classes, all CI-blocking

classmeaningexample it would have caught
👻 GHOSTdispatch path references an unregistered id → fails at runtimetypo'd id in hooks.json
💀 NEW DEADregistered hook outside the closure, not grandfathered#2886: team-size-gate guarded 'Task', matcher 'Agent'… caught at the registration layer by count drift; the class is caught here
🧟 STALE BASELINEbaseline entry no longer dead — must be removed (ratchet honesty)revived hook still listed as dead
🔢 COUNT DRIFT"148 global + 46 agent + 22 skill = 216" accounting vs computedadding a hook without updating the description
🪞 SELF-CHECKparser extracts 0 ids → the validator itself brokethe OLD validator: parsed the legacy command format, saw 0 hooks.json entries, and PASSED for months

3 The old validator was itself dead 🤡

❌ before (since hooks.json moved to args-form)

$ node scripts/validate-registry.mjs
hooks.json entries: 0        ← parser matched nothing
⚠ 248 orphaned hooks
Result: PASS with warnings   ← exit 0, wired into NOTHING

✅ after (this PR)

$ node scripts/validate-registry.mjs
registered : 248 · closure : 197
dead (grandfathered) : 51 of 51
Result: PASS  ← and wired into ci.yml
        + tests/run-all-tests.sh

4 Negative controls — every class proven to bite

remove a still-dead baseline entry → ✗ NEW DEAD HOOKS (1) · FAIL
add a bogus baseline entry        → ✗ STALE BASELINE (1) · FAIL
reference an unregistered id      → ✗ GHOSTS (1) + COUNT DRIFT · FAIL
restore                           → Result: PASS ✅

5 The ratchet contract

scripts/known-dead-hooks.json grandfathers the 51 pre-existing dead hooks (incl. the 10 dead telemetry writers) pending Phase-2 triage: revive or bury, hook by hook.

The list only shrinks: a new dead hook fails CI immediately, and a revived/deleted hook still listed in the baseline ALSO fails CI — so the baseline can never rot into a dumping ground.

Bug-class history: #959 (3 telemetry streams dead 4 months) · #2886 (fan-out gate shipped dead in v8.72.0) · 2026-07-15 audit (48–51 dead hooks, 10 dead telemetry writers). CC has no native "which hooks fired" surface (verified against docs at 2.1.208) — this gate is the only line of defense.
